---
title: "Remote dApp API"
description: "Splice Wallet JSON-RPC Remote dApp API"
---

# Remote dApp API

[Back to overview](/reference/wallet-gateway-json-rpc)

An OpenRPC specification for remotely hosted Wallet Providers. Due to the remote nature, an implementing provider must bridge certain functionality on the client-side to satisfy the general dApp API spec.

## Table of Contents

| Name | Kind | Summary | Introduced | Changed | Deprecated | Removed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [`accountsChanged`](#method-accountschanged) | `Method` | - | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |
| [`connect`](#method-connect) | `Method` | Ensures ledger connectivity and returns the connected network information. | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |
| [`connected`](#method-connected) | `Method` | Informs when the user connects to a network. | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |
| [`disconnect`](#method-disconnect) | `Method` | Invoke a disconnect of the wallet gateway session. | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |
| [`getActiveNetwork`](#method-getactivenetwork) | `Method` | Returns the active network. | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |
| [`getPrimaryAccount`](#method-getprimaryaccount) | `Method` | Returns the primary account. | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |
| [`ledgerApi`](#method-ledgerapi) | `Method` | Proxy for the JSON-API endpoints. Injects authorization headers automatically. | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |
| [`listAccounts`](#method-listaccounts) | `Method` | - | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |
| [`onStatusChanged`](#method-onstatuschanged) | `Method` | - | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |
| [`prepareExecute`](#method-prepareexecute) | `Method` | Prepares, signs, and executes a transaction. | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |
| [`signMessage`](#method-signmessage) | `Method` | Signs a message. | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |
| [`status`](#method-status) | `Method` | Returns the current status of the wallet provider session. | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |
| [`txChanged`](#method-txchanged) | `Method` | - | `0.20.0` | - | - | - |

## Version Change Summary

| Version | Added | Changed | Removed |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `0.20.0` | 0 | 0 | 0 |
| `0.21.0` | 0 | 0 | 0 |

## Reference

<a id="method-accountschanged"></a>
### `accountsChanged`

- Introduced: `0.20.0`

**Parameters**

_No parameters._

**Result**

| Schema | Required Fields | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `array[object]` | - | - |

**Result Example**

```json
[
  {
    "primary": "<boolean>",
    "partyId": "<string>",
    "status": "<string>",
    "hint": "<string>",
    "publicKey": "<string>",
    "namespace": "<string>",
    "networkId": "<string>",
    "signingProviderId": "<string>"
  }
]
```

<a id="method-connect"></a>
### `connect`

- Introduced: `0.20.0`

Ensures ledger connectivity and returns the connected network information.

**Parameters**

_No parameters._

**Result**

| Schema | Required Fields | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `object` | `isConnected`, `isNetworkConnected` | - |

**Result Example**

```json
{
  "isConnected": "<boolean>",
  "isNetworkConnected": "<boolean>"
}
```

<a id="method-connected"></a>
### `connected`

- Introduced: `0.20.0`

Informs when the user connects to a network.

**Parameters**

_No parameters._

**Result**

| Schema | Required Fields | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `object` | `connection`, `provider` | - |

**Result Example**

```json
{
  "provider": {
    "id": "<string>"
  },
  "connection": {
    "isConnected": "<boolean>",
    "isNetworkConnected": "<boolean>"
  }
}
```

<a id="method-disconnect"></a>
### `disconnect`

- Introduced: `0.20.0`

Invoke a disconnect of the wallet gateway session.

**Parameters**

_No parameters._

**Result**

| Schema | Required Fields | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `null` | - | - |

**Result Example**

```json
"<value>"
```

<a id="method-getactivenetwork"></a>
### `getActiveNetwork`

- Introduced: `0.20.0`

Returns the active network.

**Parameters**

_No parameters._

**Result**

| Schema | Required Fields | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `object` | `networkId` | - |

**Result Example**

```json
{
  "networkId": "<string>"
}
```

<a id="method-getprimaryaccount"></a>
### `getPrimaryAccount`

- Introduced: `0.20.0`

Returns the primary account.

**Parameters**

_No parameters._

**Result**

| Schema | Required Fields | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `object` | `hint`, `namespace`, `networkId`, `partyId`, `primary`, `publicKey`, `signingProviderId`, `status` | - |

**Result Example**

```json
{
  "primary": "<boolean>",
  "partyId": "<string>",
  "status": "<string>",
  "hint": "<string>",
  "publicKey": "<string>",
  "namespace": "<string>",
  "networkId": "<string>",
  "signingProviderId": "<string>"
}
```

<a id="method-ledgerapi"></a>
### `ledgerApi`

- Introduced: `0.20.0`

Proxy for the JSON-API endpoints. Injects authorization headers automatically.

**Parameters**

| Parameter | Schema | Required Fields | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `params` | `object` | `requestMethod`, `resource` | - |

**Result**

| Schema | Required Fields | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `object` | `response` | - |

**Params Example**

```json
{
  "params": {
    "requestMethod": "<string>",
    "resource": "<string>"
  }
}
```

**Result Example**

```json
{
  "response": "<string>"
}
```

<a id="method-prepareexecute"></a>
### `prepareExecute`

- Introduced: `0.20.0`

Prepares, signs, and executes a transaction.

**Parameters**

| Parameter | Schema | Required Fields | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `params` | `object` | `commands` | - |

**Result**

| Schema | Required Fields | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `object` | `userUrl` | - |

**Params Example**

```json
{
  "params": {
    "commands": {}
  }
}
```

**Result Example**

```json
{
  "userUrl": "<string>"
}
```
